MOTION Notice Of Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Aug-28-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Elizabeth Cohee, ESq. of the Law Offices of GEORGE HOLLAND 510/465-4100 for Plaintiff and moving to tax costs
Misty L. Greene, Esq. of HINSHAW & CULBERTSON 362-6000 for defendant EQUILON ENTERPRISES LLC dba Shell Oil Company and opposing party
* A R G U E D and the Court granted the motion to tax costs and costs are awarded in the amount of $1,013.00. Hon. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II (301/md) Joyce Long, CSR 8620

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-25-2002 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Misty L. Greene, Esq. of HINSHAW & CULBERTSON 362-6000 for defendant EQUILON ENTERPRISES LLC dba Shell Oil Company moving party
James J. Keenan, Jr., Esq. 916/444-9194 for defendant PETROLEUM SALES joining in the motion
Elizabeth Cohee, Esq. of the LAW OFFICES OF GEORGE HOLLAND 510/465-4100 for Plaintiff and opposing party

Defendant EQUILON ENTERPRISES' motion was argued and tentative ruling adopted -- Granted -- no triable issue of fact as to date of discovery of defendant SHELL's involvement in claimed negligence. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
Defendant PETROLEUM SALES' joinder in the motion was argued and the Court granted the motion for summary judgment -- no duty to protect Plaintiff -- no triable issue of fact exists as to forseeability to protect Plaintiff from this incident. (JJM/md) Eric Throne, CSR 7855.
